_comment: Curated 'Current Local Info' per FDRA slug — Jim-approved sources only. Each item: title, note, optional 'playlist' (YouTube uploads playlist ID, UU..., always shows the channel's latest video), optional links[]. Remove an item (or a whole slug) when the incident ends.

montrose_high.title: Gold Mountain Fire
montrose_high.note: Burning north of Ouray on the GMUG National Forest. The incident team posts a video briefing most mornings (around 10am) — the player always shows the latest.

montrose_high.title: Elk Fire
montrose_high.note: Burning in the Uncompahgre Wilderness north of Lake City, near the Gunnison–Hinsdale county line. A video feed will appear here if the incident team publishes one.

links.name: West Slope Fire Info — Elk Fire updates
